message:
Add scriptbots-index crate and update workspace dependencies

This commit adds recent development work and project documentation:

Changes:
- Added scriptbots-index crate: New module for indexing and spatial data
  structures to efficiently locate agents and resources in the simulation
- Updated Cargo.toml workspace: Renamed scriptbots-brain-neuro to
  scriptbots-brain-ml for clarity, added scriptbots-index to workspace
- Enhanced scriptbots-brain-ml: Updated ML brain implementation with
  additional neural network architectures and training capabilities
- Added codex_log.txt: Development log from the coding agent documenting
  the initial setup and architectural decisions made during project creation

The scriptbots-index crate will provide spatial indexing data structures
(e.g., quadtrees, spatial hashing) to optimize collision detection and
nearest-neighbor queries as the simulation scales to larger populations.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
